description_long: This is a hardcover book with a textured, deep blue cover that appears to be made of faux leather or a similar material. The front cover features gold-embossed text and two small gold symbols in the lower corners, giving it an ornate and somewhat antique appearance. The spine is also blue and textured, with faint gold text running vertically. The back cover is plain, matching the front in color and texture but without any visible markings or embellishments. The book's pages are visible from the top and side views, showing a slightly yellowed, aged paper look. The overall design suggests a special or collectible edition, possibly for a fantasy or historical theme.
description: A deep blue, textured hardcover book with gold-embossed text and symbols, featuring an ornate and antique appearance.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing gold-embossed text and two gold symbols on a textured blue surface.
description_view_1: The top edge of the book is shown, revealing the yellowed pages and the thickness of the book.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, plain and matching the blue textured material of the front without any markings.
description_view_3: The spine is shown, featuring faint gold text running vertically on the same blue textured background.
attribute_title_text: Ye Olde Book o' Dimensional Challenges
attribute_spine_design: The spine is blue and textured, with faint gold text running vertically. There are no additional decorative elements or patterns.
attribute_publisher_logo: There is a small gold hexagonal symbol in the lower right corner of the front cover, which may represent a publisher logo.
